title: Help police find father, child
bodyText:
Breaking News

MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit (FCS) urgently needs to contact Jacob Maré.


> He fetched his nine-year-old daughter, Yaleen Maré, from her school in Hartenbos on Monday, 14 October, and the pair have not been seen or heard from since.


There is a Western Cape High Court order, granted on 18 October, that Yaleen be returned to her mother.If anyone knows the whereabouts of Maré and Yaleen or sees them, they should contact Warrant Officer Alistair Rezant of the Mossel Bay FCS (082 234 3557) or Crime Stop (08600 10111).
